description: Triggers when the user wants to create SEO-optimized pages at scale using templates and data — location pages, integration pages, comparison pages, directory pages
should_trigger: I want to create hundreds of location pages for my local service business — like 'plumber in [city]'
Build a programmatic SEO strategy using integration pages for my SaaS product
How do I generate template-based pages at scale for SEO without thin content penalties?
I want to create a directory of AI tools like best-of category pages
Create comparison pages for my product vs each competitor
Implement programmatic SEO with Next.js generateStaticParams for 500 cities
should_not_trigger: Audit the SEO of my existing homepage
Write a single blog post about JavaScript performance
